overall.description: A first-person walk along a highway on the outskirts of a futuristic city at dusk, from the video game Cyberpunk 2077. The clip begins with a panoramic view of the Night City skyline featuring holographic advertisements on skyscrapers, then proceeds along the highway shoulder past concrete barriers and graffiti-covered walls, transitioning into a desert landscape with sparse vegetation and increasing atmospheric haze.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway overlook with futuristic city skyline view

events.description: camera pans right to reveal the Night City skyline with holographic advertisements on skyscrapers
camera turns back to face forward and begins walking along the highway shoulder

agents.ego_description: standing on the highway shoulder initially, panning to admire the city skyline, then turning to walk forward

notable_agents.action: derelict car parked abandoned on the highway shoulder

entered.detail: tall concrete highway barrier separating the shoulder from the drop-off
steep concrete retaining wall covered in colorful graffiti art
futuristic skyscrapers with illuminated windows and holographic billboards
abandoned car with open doors sitting on the road shoulder
multi-lane asphalt road with white painted lane markings

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a highway shoulder at dusk with a view of a futuristic city skyline in the distance. The camera pans right to reveal towering skyscrapers adorned with glowing holographic advertisements against an orange sunset sky, then turns to begin walking forward along the road, passing a derelict vehicle and concrete barriers.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban highway shoulder with passing traffic

events.description: futuristic vehicles drive past on the left side of the highway
approaching the end of the concrete barrier section as the urban landscape transitions

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the highway shoulder beside the concrete divider

notable_agents.action: futuristic sedan driving at high speed along the highway lanes

entered.detail: tall metal utility poles with crossbars and street lighting fixtures
steep rocky terrain rising behind the graffiti wall

segments.scene_description: Walking along the urban highway shoulder with concrete barriers on the right and a graffiti-covered retaining wall on the left. Vehicles occasionally pass by on the road while street light poles line the left side. The city skyline disappears from view as the camera moves forward, with rocky hills visible in the background.

events.description: concrete barrier ends and is replaced by metal guardrail, landscape shifts to desert scrub
atmospheric dust and haze increase significantly, reducing visibility of the horizon

agents.ego_description: continuing along the highway as the environment transitions to desert terrain with increasing dust

entered.detail: silver metal highway guardrail with vertical posts
sparse desert bushes and small drought-resistant plants
thick haze of dust particles reducing visibility and creating an orange-tinted atmosphere
wooden electrical utility poles with connecting wires

segments.scene_description: The highway transitions from urban infrastructure to desert badlands as the concrete barrier gives way to a metal guardrail. Sparse desert vegetation appears on the right while utility poles line the left. The atmosphere becomes increasingly hazy with dust, obscuring the distant horizon and giving the scene a diffused, warm light as the walk continues into the arid landscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey that transitions from the glowing edge of a futuristic metropolis into a desolate, hazy desert. It begins on a highway shoulder at dusk, panning across a skyline of towering skyscrapers and holographic advertisements under an orange sunset before moving forward past a derelict vehicle and concrete barriers. As the camera advances, the city skyline fades from view, replaced by a corridor of graffiti-covered walls and passing traffic that gradually gives way to rocky hills in the distance. The scene then shifts from urban infrastructure to the badlands as concrete barriers are replaced by metal guardrails and sparse desert vegetation appears. Finally, the environment opens into an arid landscape where utility poles line the road and a thick atmospheric haze diffuses the warm light, obscuring the horizon.
